'''badhogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fnc|fnc]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-dh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fnc|fnc]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| badhogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bædhegeth|bædhegeth]] || [[word:bædhegej|bædhegej]] || [[word:bædhegesh|bædhegesh]] || [[word:bædhege|bædhege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:badhodhogoth|badhodhogoth]] || [[word:badhodhogoj|badhodhogoj]] || [[word:badhodhogosh|badhodhogosh]] || [[word:badhodhogo|badhodhogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:badhogoth|badhogoth]] || [[word:badhogoj|badhogoj]] || [[word:badhogosh|badhogosh]] || [[word:badhogo|badhogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:badhofgoth|badhofgoth]] || [[word:badhofgoj|badhofgoj]] || [[word:badhofgosh|badhofgosh]] || [[word:badhofgof|badhofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:badhogotho|badhogotho]] || [[word:badhogojo|badhogojo]] || [[word:badhogosho|badhogosho]] || [[word:badhogoko|badhogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:badhogoth|badhogoth]] || [[word:badhogoj|badhogoj]] || [[word:badhogosh|badhogosh]] || [[word:badhogo|badhogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:badhogothol|badhogothol]] || [[word:badhogojol|badhogojol]] || [[word:badhogoshol|badhogoshol]] || [[word:badhogokol|badhogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:badhogothotho|badhogothotho]] || [[word:badhogojojo|badhogojojo]] || [[word:badhogoshosho|badhogoshosho]] || [[word:badhogoko|badhogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:badhogothon|badhogothon]] || [[word:badhogojon|badhogojon]] || [[word:badhogoshon|badhogoshon]] || [[word:badhogokon|badhogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:badhogothoro|badhogothoro]] || [[word:badhogojoro|badhogojoro]] || [[word:badhogoshoro|badhogoshoro]] || [[word:badhogokoro|badhogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
